The '''''Allegiant''''' was an [[MC80B Star Cruiser]] in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==History==
An aging vessel, ''Allegiant'' acted as the mobile base of operations for [[Nomad Squadron]] and provided patrol defense for the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] was still in duty during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]], although it may have been reactivated from a mothballed fleet.

{{Ship-stub}}
